name: Squash Casserole#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the yellow squash well and cut into 1/2 inch slices.
2. Boil or steam the squash until it is tender.
3. Cool the squash at least slightly, then drain and mash.
4. Add the grated onion, pimiento, cheese (up to 1 cup), cracker crumbs, egg, margarine, milk, and salt.
5. Mix all ingredients together thoroughly.
6. Place the mixture in a greased casserole dish.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for about 30 minutes.
